nodes.x: Behold, bless ye the Lord, all ye servants of the Lord, which by night stand in the house of the Lord.
Behold, this is the promise of the Lord unto you, O ye my servants.

And he said, Behold now, my lords, turn in, I pray you, into your servant’s house, and tarry all night, and wash your feet, and ye shall rise up early, and go on your ways. And they said, Nay; but we will abide in the street all night.
Praise ye the Lord. Praise, O ye servants of the Lord, praise the name of the Lord.
Praise ye the Lord. Praise ye the name of the Lord; praise him, O ye servants of the Lord.

And we ask thee, Holy Father, that thy servants may go forth from this house armed with thy power, and that thy name may be upon them, and thy glory be round about them, and thine angels have charge over them;
Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, and bless the Lord.
Let us lift up our heart with our hands unto God in the heavens.

Open your houses and your hearts, and receive and feed the Elders who come among you; give them means, and aid them in their travels ; and verily your sick shall be healed, the evil demons which trouble you shall be cast out, and you shall have good dreams and visions of the Lord, and angels shall minister to some of you, and your hearts shall swell with love and gladness, and you will feel to…
Behold, my beloved brethren, remember the words of your God; pray unto him continually by day, and give thanks unto his holy name by night. Let your hearts rejoice.
Lift up your hearts and rejoice, for unto you the kingdom, or in other words, the keys of the church have been given. Even so. Amen.
Sing unto the Lord, bless his name; shew forth his salvation from day to day.
The Lord that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.
The Lord shall bless thee out of Zion: and thou shalt see the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life.
Blessed be the Lord out of Zion, which dwelleth at Jerusalem. Praise ye the Lord.
The Lord hath brought forth our righteousness: come, and let us declare in Zion the work of the Lord our God.
